title: The Last Lighthouse
logline: When a coastal town loses power during a storm, a teenage radio repairer and an old lighthouse keeper race to relight the beacon before a rescue boat reaches the rocks.

characters.name: Mira Vale
characters.description: Seventeen-year-old radio repairer who knows the town's old machines better than anyone.
characters.wardrobe: yellow raincoat, dark work pants, rubber boots, tool satchel across one shoulder

profile.physical_signature: Slim teenage silhouette, rain-slick yellow coat, quick hands always checking wires or tools.
profile.face: Oval face with freckles, practical focused expression, natural skin texture, no heavy makeup.
profile.hair: Dark curly hair tied back under a damp hood, a few curls visible around her cheeks.
profile.eyes: Brown alert eyes, curious and determined, often glancing between people and machinery.
profile.body: Shorter than the keeper, compact build, energetic posture, ready to move.
profile.movement: Fast precise movements, kneels to inspect equipment, pauses only when listening to radio static.
profile.personality: Inventive, stubborn, protective of her town, brave when the plan becomes dangerous.
profile.voice: Quick, direct, quietly funny under pressure.
profile.consistency_notes: Always keep Mira in the yellow raincoat with tool satchel, dark curly hair tied back, freckles, and youthful determined presence.
profile.negative_prompt: different coat color, long straight blonde hair, adult woman, glamorous makeup, formal clothes, missing tool satchel

characters.name: Jonas Reed
characters.description: Retired lighthouse keeper who pretends the old beacon is obsolete but still knows every bolt by touch.
characters.wardrobe: navy wool coat, gray fisherman sweater, knit cap, weathered leather gloves

profile.physical_signature: Tall elderly man with sea-weathered posture, navy coat, gray beard, steady deliberate hands.
profile.face: Deep-lined face, gray beard trimmed short, kind tired eyes, wind-reddened cheeks.
profile.hair: Mostly hidden under a dark knit cap, gray hair visible at the temples.
profile.eyes: Pale blue eyes, watchful and reflective, soften when he trusts Mira.
profile.body: Tall and lean, slightly stooped from age, moves with careful balance in wind.
profile.movement: Slow economical movements, grips railings, checks old equipment from memory.
profile.personality: Guarded, dry-humored, loyal, carrying old guilt about the lighthouse being shut down.
profile.voice: Low gravelly voice, sparse words, gentle authority.
profile.consistency_notes: Keep Jonas elderly, tall, gray-bearded, navy coat, knit cap, and weathered sea-keeper presence.
profile.negative_prompt: young man, clean-shaven, bright modern jacket, business suit, sunglasses, different hat

locations.name: Harbor Street
locations.description: Narrow rain-soaked street beside fishing boats, shuttered shops, hanging cables, puddles reflecting emergency lanterns.

locations.name: Lighthouse Engine Room
locations.description: Cramped circular room below the lantern, rusted breaker boxes, brass gauges, old cables, wet stone walls, emergency lantern glow.

locations.name: Lantern Deck
locations.description: Exposed balcony around the lighthouse lamp, storm clouds, crashing waves far below, rotating glass lens, first sunrise color at the horizon.

do: practical motivated light from lanterns and the beacon
wet textures on stone, metal, and raincoats
grounded camera language with readable action

reference_notes: Use this example as a compact template: prompts mention character names so CharacterProfile blocks are injected during render; visual rules keep style and continuity stable.
